title: Phrygilanthus aphyllus
taxonomy: Phrygilanthus aphyllus is classified within the family Achariaceae, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical regions. The genus Phrygilanthus itself is a part of the order Malpighiales, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Within the family Achariaceae, Phrygilanthus aphyllus is one of several species that share similar characteristics. This classification is based on the plant's morphology, anatomy, and molecular characteristics. Further research may be needed to confirm the accuracy of this classification.
